subject: Sync docker tags with release manifest
commit_message:
Sync docker tags with release manifest

Sync docker tags with the release manifest.  It is
assumed that the release manifest is the
"single source of truth" and that the versions in
the helm charts are out of date.

Change-Id: I2902e60b25f57409dd616780a626e63c92d26769
Issue-ID: INT-663
Signed-off-by: Gary Wu <gary.i.wu@huawei.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/921/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/921

Patch Set 1:

It would be easier to test many small patches instead of one large.
Current state on my env, which is missing POMBA and VFC (due to deployment size too large for my env in openlab). As you see, aaf, appc and oof fail. Other components could be approved.
